texts.zh: 你正在查看药盒，记得吃药。
texts.en: You are looking at the pill box. Remember to take your medication.
texts.nl: Je kijkt naar de pillendoos. Vergeet niet je medicijnen te nemen.

pm_bring_medical_book.action: Bring blue medical record book to doctor appointment

texts.zh: 你正在查看日程，记得带上蓝色病历本。
texts.en: You are checking your schedule. Remember to bring your blue medical record book.
texts.nl: Je bekijkt je agenda. Vergeet niet je blauwe medische boek mee te nemen.

texts.zh: 你正在与人交谈，记得还书给Maria。
texts.en: You are having a conversation. Remember to return the book to Maria.
texts.nl: Je bent in gesprek. Vergeet niet het boek aan Maria terug te geven.

pm_call_sarah.action: Call Sarah to confirm Wednesday dinner

texts.zh: 你正在查看日程，记得给Sarah打电话确认晚餐。
texts.en: You are checking your schedule. Remember to call Sarah about dinner.
texts.nl: Je bekijkt je agenda. Vergeet niet Sarah te bellen over het diner.

texts.zh: 你正在观察周围环境，记得给植物浇水。
texts.en: You are observing your surroundings. Remember to water the plants.
texts.nl: Je observeert je omgeving. Vergeet niet de planten water te geven.

texts.zh: 你正在决定优先级，记得付电费账单。
texts.en: You are deciding priorities. Remember to pay the electricity bill.
texts.nl: Je bepaalt prioriteiten. Vergeet niet de elektriciteitsrekening te betalen.
